prediction.reasoning: For a 6-day prediction of UNH stock, I applied typical short-term equity volatility assumptions. Large-cap healthcare stocks like UNH typically exhibit annualized volatility around 20-25%. For 6 trading days, this translates to approximately 1.9% daily volatility. The point estimate assumes no drift (random walk), while confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with expanding uncertainty bands reflecting the inherent unpredictability of short-term stock movements.
